scripts.build: npm run build -w @pi-cloud/shared && npm run build -w @pi-cloud/backend && npm run build -w @pi-cloud/sandbox && npm run build -w @pi-cloud/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,sandbox,web -c blue,magenta,green "npm run dev -w @pi-cloud/backend" "npm run dev -w @pi-cloud/sandbox" "npm run dev -w @pi-cloud/web"
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @pi-cloud/shared && npm run typecheck -w @pi-cloud/backend && npm run typecheck -w @pi-cloud/sandbox && npm run typecheck -w @pi-cloud/web
